message:
🐛 Silence expected console errors in demo mode (#646)

- Dashboard: Add UnauthenticatedError to expected failure check so
  demo mode doesn't log "Failed to load dashboard" errors
- CustomDashboard: Same fix for custom dashboard loading
- useCertManager: Skip console.error when agent is unavailable in
  demo mode (expected behavior, not an error)

Audited all 29 routes - zero console errors remain.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
